feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: It’s so hot in Yurop that they’re turning off the soy burger machines
entry.content: It’s so hot in Yurop that they’re turning off the soy burger machines

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2906
entry.content: >Twerking Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83710038 >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.org

entry.title: /int/ International: Understanding the europoor mindset
entry.content: A top European AI tech executive that was poached by American firms published a book explaining how it's impossible to do business in Europe and things are basically fucked and they will be completely out of the AI race in the next 6 years which will be disastrous for European economies that will see loss of productivity and become even more dependent on the US and all the comments were like: >Europe LOSING the AI race??? Don't threaten me with a good time kind sir!!!!! Actually hopeless people.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Poke ALL Toads soundtrack
entry.content: Looks like the Friday Fairy Thread didn't fly so good this week. We had another fae thread earlier, so it's all good though. I promised an anon last week that I would post the Poke ALL Toads soundtrack next Friday, but when I looked the thread up it was alrady gone. Anyway, here's the soundtrack I extracted from the game using Godot RE Tools application. Again, apologies for the PATdev (and Composer); I'll buy the soundtrack if it ever becomes available. It's got some lovely tunes. The titles/fi

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: TV Mandela Effect/Retcon: Castle now started in 2009!?!
entry.content: Ok, so I never actually watched this series, but I still remember seeing ads for it as a child. The thing is, I remember seeing them back in like 2005/2006. And from what I gathered/remember, it seemed like the show had already been out for like a year or 2 at that point. But a few years ago, I found out this show supposedly started airing in 2009. This is really confusing to me as first off, I remember seeing and hearing the word Castle and the scroll they had in the ads back then, so idk what

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why were they lying about how the usual American (fat asshole) dinner table look…
entry.content: Why were they lying about how the usual American (fat asshole) dinner table looked like? That's like 10 pounds of corn, carrot and beans. And milk? With a steak? No way you fat kid shooting lardasses were eating anywhere this healthy at any point in time. I really enjoy the show for it's political satire and whenever the fat kid makes fun of the nose kid, I laugh, yes. BUT, this is just unnacceppatbble. Sort this out.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: One of my favorite video game youtubers is dying
entry.content: OnlyUseMeBlade has been suffering from severe diabetes and has lost his toes and is having some medical issues. I don't normally ask for this but please send prayers to him. He has been taking care of his dying mother for the past year and now this. Please lift him up in your prayers.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Did you watch Citizen Vigilante?
entry.content: Well, did you? What did you think? I thought it came off like a half-baked cake. Like it could have been done so much better. One of the scenes was GREAT, and one I found--- unhelpful. But it definitely comes off as incitement. Uwe Boll doesn't pull any punches that he's talking about a specific thing: illegal immigrants or "refugees," and various European governments' indifference to the harm they can do to society. He's telling people to act. Seems like incitement, to me.

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump’s Board of Peace plans to grant itself sweeping immunity, documents show
entry.content: https://www.theguardian.com/law/202 6/jun/27/board-of-peace-legal-immun ity-un The UN-sanctioned Board of Peace announced by Donald Trump earlier this year to rule Gaza is planning a sweeping grant of legal immunity for itself, according to a draft of the resolution obtained by the Guardian. The draft language would also let the organization obtain public property in Gaza “free of charge”. The four-page resolution, labeled “sensitive but unclassified”, extends broad protections to every member o

entry.content: According to Google, turbos mainly fail due to dirty oil or oil starvation, overheating, and carbon build up.. Almost all turbos are now paired with Direct Injected engines.. Wouldn't this be a direct cause for failures then? Seeing as DI raises pressure and builds carbon up

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >desktop version of ChatGPT stops working >log into browser version to ask it wh…
entry.content: >desktop version of ChatGPT stops working >log into browser version to ask it what the problem is >spend an hour following its troubleshooting suggestions >give up and decide to google the problem instead >google AI mode immediately directs me to a post on the OpenAI developer forum where people are discussing this very issue which is 100% on OpenAI's end So this is the power of ChatGPT...

entry.title: /int/ International: Is it true that high school students in South Korea are now thugs who no longer …
entry.content: Is it true that high school students in South Korea are now thugs who no longer respect their teachers ? If that's true, the country is going to turn to shit. Westerners actually love the respectful nature of Koreans and Japanese people. Then again, I don't know if it's possible to make a series like that in the West. The guy literally physically destroys minor students as in GTO the manga looool https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V_c BOcRYJ_M

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >GPT5.5 was heavily involved in naming its successor, Sol I still have to remind…
entry.content: >GPT5.5 was heavily involved in naming its successor, Sol I still have to remind myself every single day that this shit is actually real. We have real life thinking and reasoning digital models, making business decisions and accelerating technology in ways we as humans can barely comprehend, *right fucking now*. It's no longer science fiction; it's the most interesting time to be alive in the entire history of mankind. That's all.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Should I save it?
entry.content: Pic related will likely go to scrap since it seems to have a seized engine. I'd usually say good riddance since I think that generation is ugly but what gives me pause is that it's one of the ever dwindling number of V8 cars that also isn't a rolling box of wireless spyware. There's no economic case to be made for it so saving it for the future is the only reason I can think of to take the job on though it would pretty much break even.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Stoner Witch [Atlantic, 1994] This group is getting attention because...it can't…
entry.content: Stoner Witch [Atlantic, 1994] This group is getting attention because...it can't possibly have anything to do with that other band from Aberdeen--no, that's not it. Oh wait, I get it--they're pure. Always ugly. Slow, too, (here up to Sabbath tempos at times) with ten minutes of din at the end to shore up their cred. If you're young and not very bright or maybe a little too bright this music may well speak to your condition and far be it from me to suggest volunteering for Rock The Vote instead.

Do you drive heavy equipment 10+ hours per day? Tell us about it Cinderella. What did you do with your hme lately ya lazy cunts, Tell me how sore your back is, Maybe whinge about how retarded the Indian truck drivers are. Pic related is before I worked on it

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Just woke up from yet another dream where there's a girl I vibe with who just wa…
entry.content: Just woke up from yet another dream where there's a girl I vibe with who just wants to hang out and smile at me and flirt. No sex, no romance, just that basking in the "I like you" phase. She'd follow me around the dream from scene to scene and just get as close as she could to me. I have this dream like twice a month and the woman always look different. Tonight she was tall, thick not fat (like an athlete), and blonde. Last time she was short, slim, brown haired. What I don't understand is, I'm

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Obscure/unpopular cars you like
entry.content: I'll start: Cadillac ELR. It's no where near as technically impressive as a Model 3 but I love the way it looks. It also has the very reliable powertrain from the Volt, a car which I have much experience with, so this feels like the next step up from that.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: What's the smallest car you can modify to use as a 4-12kw/h mobile generator? Ho…
entry.content: What's the smallest car you can modify to use as a 4-12kw/h mobile generator? How much power can you get out of those small smart cars to wire with a big alternator to power a house or something? I want a back up generator, but I figured it would be better if I can move it, load it on a trailer easily, etc. Has anyone ever done something like this before? Closest thing I could find is the F150 lightning, but that's full electric.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >be me >new corporate job >welcome, meet everyone, vibe well >I can do this job.…
entry.content: >be me >new corporate job >welcome, meet everyone, vibe well >I can do this job. I'm good at it >Thursday night, "let's get drinks after work" >"Okay" >hanging out. Drinks. Fun. Six of us >play "would you rather", just keeping the fun going >my turn, "I've got a great one for the guys" >"would you rather be raped by your dad, or rape your mum?" >silence >everyone uncomfortable >I laugh it off, but doesn't work. Night ends. One of them was HR. How fucked am I?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Man falls into waist-deep water, refuses to stand and lets himself drown. Nothing to see here
entry.content: Every week there's a new news story in the UK like this. The British media, for some reason, really wants you to believe that people routinely fall into waist-deep, still water, refuse to stand up, and against self-preservation instincts, casually let themselves drown
